description: A panoramic watercolor view across the Neva River in Saint Petersburg. The wide, calm river stretches across the foreground with several sailing ships and smaller boats, including a gilded rowboat with passengers. In the middle distance, the Peter and Paul Fortress rises behind its walls, crowned by the tall golden spire of the Peter and Paul Cathedral. The sky is broad and luminous with soft clouds, and the spire's reflection glimmers on the water's surface. The overall effect is one of spacious calm and imperial grandeur.

_meta.title: View of the Neva and the Peter and Paul fortress
